targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS line_items
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', date(f.timestamp)) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS line_items
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY date(f.timestamp)
ORDER BY time

targets.queryText:
SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Total Cost"
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Total Cost"
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  UPPER(SUBSTR(d.cost_type, 1, 1)) || LOWER(SUBSTR(d.cost_type, 2)) || ' Cost' AS cost_type,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.cost_type
ORDER BY value DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  UPPER(SUBSTR(d.cost_type, 1, 1)) || LOWER(SUBSTR(d.cost_type, 2)) || ' Cost' AS cost_type,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.cost_type
ORDER BY value DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN d.env_id = '' THEN 'Org-level' ELSE d.env_id END AS environment,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.env_id
ORDER BY value DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN d.env_id = '' THEN 'Org-level' ELSE d.env_id END AS environment,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.env_id
ORDER BY value DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id) AS resource,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR d.env_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id)
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id) AS resource,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = d.resource_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND ('${environment}' = '$__all' OR d.env_id IN (${environment:sqlstring}))
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY COALESCE(r.display_name, d.resource_id)
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i.display_name, d.identity_id) AS "Principal",
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Cost"
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN identities i ON i.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND i.identity_id = d.identity_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.identity_id
ORDER BY "Cost" DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(i.display_name, d.identity_id) AS "Principal",
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS "Cost"
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
LEFT JOIN identities i ON i.ecosystem = d.ecosystem
  AND i.tenant_id = d.tenant_id
  AND i.identity_id = d.identity_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND f.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY d.identity_id
ORDER BY "Cost" DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT SUM(CAST(b.total_cost AS REAL)) AS "Total Cost"
FROM (
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM billing
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM ccloud_billing
) b
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT SUM(CAST(b.total_cost AS REAL)) AS "Total Cost"
FROM (
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM billing
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM ccloud_billing
) b
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN b.env_id = '' THEN 'Org-level' ELSE b.env_id END AS metric,
  SUM(CAST(b.total_cost AS REAL)) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost, '' AS env_id FROM billing
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost, env_id FROM ccloud_billing
) b
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY b.env_id
ORDER BY value DESC
targets.rawQueryText:

  CASE WHEN b.env_id = '' THEN 'Org-level' ELSE b.env_id END AS metric,

  UNION ALL
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost, env_id FROM ccloud_billing
) b
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY b.env_id
ORDER BY value DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(r.display_name, b.resource_id) AS "Resource",
  SUM(CAST(b.total_cost AS REAL)) AS value
FROM (
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM billing
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM ccloud_billing
) b
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = b.ecosystem
  AND r.tenant_id = b.tenant_id
  AND r.resource_id = b.resource_id
WHERE b.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND b.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND b.timestamp BETWEEN datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')
                      AND datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')
GROUP BY b.resource_id
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 15
targets.rawQueryText:

  COALESCE(r.display_name, b.resource_id) AS "Resource",

  UNION ALL
  SELECT ecosystem, tenant_id, timestamp, resource_id, product_type, total_cost FROM ccloud_billing
) b
LEFT JOIN resources r ON r.ecosystem = b.ecosystem

panels.title: Cost Split per Product Type via Billing

targets.queryText:
SELECT resource_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM resources
WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND status = 'active'
GROUP BY resource_type
ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT resource_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM resources
WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND status = 'active'
GROUP BY resource_type
ORDER BY count DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT identity_type, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM identities
WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
GROUP BY identity_type
ORDER BY count DESC
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT identity_type, COUNT(*) AS count

WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
GROUP BY identity_type
ORDER BY count DESC

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  d.product_category,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY time, d.product_category
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER) AS time,
  d.product_category,
  SUM(CAST(f.amount AS REAL)) AS value
FROM chargeback_facts f
JOIN chargeback_dimensions d ON d.dimension_id = f.dimension_id
WHERE d.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND d.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND CAST(strftime('%s', f.timestamp) AS INTEGER)
      BETWEEN $__from/1000 AND $__to/1000
GROUP BY time, d.product_category
ORDER BY time

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM chargeback_dimensions WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
list.name: tenant_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id FROM chargeback_dimensions WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT r.parent_id AS environment
FROM resources r
WHERE r.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL
list.name: environment
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT r.parent_id AS environment
FROM resources r
WHERE r.ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND r.tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL

FROM chargeback_dimensions
WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})

FROM chargeback_dimensions
WHERE ecosystem = '${ecosystem}'
  AND tenant_id IN (${tenant_id:sqlstring})
  AND product_category IN (${product_category:sqlstring})
